# Alexander Innovation Centre (AIC)

> Alexander Innovation Centre (AIC) is a Vancouver-based applied AI platform that trains Canadian workforces, supports SME AI adoption, conducts applied research, incubates AI ventures, and develops trusted Canadian-hosted infrastructure — home of ALEBEX AI and Innovation Nights. Located at #101 – 570 Dunsmuir Street, Vancouver, BC V6B 1Y1. Contact: hello@alexic.ca.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://alexic.ca/index.html): What AIC does and where to start.
- [AI Readiness Review](https://alexic.ca/ai-readiness.html): Free AI consultation — the flagship entry offer for Canadian SMEs.
- [Canada's AI Strategy & Funding](https://alexic.ca/canada-ai-strategy.html): Plain-language guide to Canada's AI for All strategy and SME funding (LIFT, Compute Access Fund).
- [For SMEs & Employers](https://alexic.ca/for-smes.html): A practical, low-risk path to AI for small and medium businesses.
- [Divisions](https://alexic.ca/divisions.html): The four AIC divisions — Workforce Academy, Innovation Lab, Venture Studio, Compute Lab.
- [Workforce Academy](https://alexic.ca/ai-workforce-sme-adoption.html): Corporate AI training and SME adoption.
- [ALEBEX AI](https://alexic.ca/alebex-ai.html): AIC's flagship Canadian voice AI and agentic workflow platform, in production.
- [Innovation Nights](https://alexic.ca/innovation-night.html): Free monthly applied-AI community events in downtown Vancouver.
- [Team](https://alexic.ca/team.html): AIC's leadership and engineering team.
- [Contact](https://alexic.ca/contact.html): Book a consultation, request a demo, or start a partnership.

## Facts
- Founded within the Alexander education group; serves all Canadian sectors (not only education).
- ALEBEX AI is the flagship product, deployed in production with education partners.
- Innovation Nights drew 165 founders, investors, and builders at its inaugural event (April 2026).
- Aligned with Canada's national AI strategy "AI for All" (Government of Canada, June 4, 2026).
